Z=#C return P(i)end,function(k)local t,Z=36228+-36227,k[351777-351776]while Z do g[Z],t=g[Z]-(1004260-1004259),t+(513321-513320)if g[Z]==-652963+652963 then g[Z],G[Z]=nil,nil end Z=k[t]end
